summary: Completed frontend testing of multiple features: Back Button in Marketplace, Country Full Names in AI Listing Creator, Auction Settings Form, Shipping Label Safe Body Reading, and Notifications Page. All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple features tested and verified: 1) Marketplace Back Button with data-testid='marketplace-back-btn' and ArrowLeft icon working, 2) AI Listing Creator shows full country names (United States, Canada, United Kingdom, etc.) instead of codes, 3) AuctionSettingsForm component integrated in Step 2 (Price) with all fields (duration, starting bid, reserve price, buy it now, auto-extend, auto-relist), 4) Shipping label generation uses safe body reading (response.text() before JSON.parse) to prevent 'body stream already read' error, 5) Notifications page has expanded notification types with proper routing for marketplace/offers/auctions/games

feature_1_marketplace_back_button.details: Back button found with data-testid='marketplace-back-btn', ArrowLeft icon visible, onClick navigates back

feature_2_marketplace_i18n.details: Marketplace header uses useTranslation hook, title shows 'Marketplace' (translated)

feature_3_country_full_names.details: AI Listing Creator shows full country names with flags: 🇺🇸United States, 🇨🇦Canada, 🇬🇧United Kingdom, 🇦🇺Australia, 🇩🇪Germany, 🇫🇷France instead of codes

feature_4_auction_settings_form.details: AuctionSettingsForm component present in Step 2 (Price) with: auction-toggle, duration buttons (1h-7d), starting-bid-input, reserve-price-input, buy-now-price-input, auto-extend-toggle, auto-relist-toggle

feature_5_shipping_label_safe_body.details: SellerDashboard.jsx lines 1180-1187 use response.text() before JSON.parse to prevent 'body stream already read' error

feature_6_notifications_routing.details: Notifications.jsx has expanded NOTIFICATION_CONFIG with types: listing_liked, listing_shared, listing_commented, order_received, offer_received, offer_accepted, offer_rejected, offer_countered, auction_bid, auction_outbid, auction_won, auction_ended, game_result. NotificationItem handleClick routes based on data.listing_id, data.order_id, data.offer_id, data.auction_id, data.post_id, data.user_id, data.game_id
